name: Morgasmatron
description: Dual 6-mode self-oscillating multimode VCF (LP2/LP1/BP1/HP1/HP2/BR1) with series/parallel routing, built-in crossfader, Q-drive soft saturation, ProCo Rat-style overdrive on Filter A and phase-invert ring modulation. MS-20-inspired Korgasmatron lineage.

controls.name: CUTOFF
controls.description: Sets filter cutoff frequency. Sums with FM1 and FM2 CV inputs and the dedicated 1V/OCT input.

controls.name: FM1
controls.description: Unipolar attenuator for FM1 CV input. FM1 tracks 1V/oct when fully CW.

controls.name: FM2
controls.description: Bipolar attenuverter for FM2 CV. Noon = no effect · CW = positive · CCW = inverted.

controls.name: MODE
controls.description: Cycles through six filter modes: LP2, LP1, BP1, HP1, HP2, BR1 (notch).

controls.name: Q
controls.description: Sets resonance. Self-oscillates at maximum, producing a pitched sine that tracks 1V/OCT.
controls.detail: Sums with Q CV input · self-osc at max

controls.name: Q-DRIVE
controls.description: Drives resonance path to keep Q high as input gain rises. Adds warming growl at mid-Q and soft-clips self-oscillating sine into squarer wave at high Q.
controls.detail: Requires some Q to work · soft-clips sine

controls.name: IN
controls.description: Input gain. Unity at ~12 o'clock (10Vpp eurorack). Past noon induces soft clipping.
controls.detail: Unity at noon · soft-clip past noon

controls.name: OVERLOAD LED
controls.description: Lights when the filter output begins to soft-clip.

controls.name: OVERDRIVE switch
controls.description: Engages ProCo Rat-style aggressive overdrive circuit on Filter A's output. Up = on · down = clean.

controls.name: DRY switch A
controls.description: Up = bypass Filter A at XFADE (raw IN A feeds the crossfader). Enables wet/dry blends and parallel distortion tricks.

controls.name: DRY switch B
controls.description: Up = bypass Filter B at XFADE (raw IN B feeds the crossfader).

controls.name: PHASE INVERT
controls.description: Inverts Filter B's phase before XFADE. Enables ring modulation via phase cancellation and subtly different parallel colours.

controls.name: SERIES / PARALLEL switch
controls.description: Up = Series (A's output feeds B's input — steeper slope or tone-staging). Down = Parallel (both process inputs independently).

controls.name: XFADE
controls.description: Crossfades between Filter A and Filter B at the MIX output. Sums with XFADE CV.
controls.detail: CCW = A · CW = B · noon = equal

controls.name: XFADE attenuverter
controls.description: Attenuates/inverts the XFADE CV input. Noon = no CV effect.

controls.name: XFADE BALANCE LEDs
controls.description: Two LEDs (green) show Filter A and Filter B contribution to MIX in real time.

inputs.name: 1V/OCT (A)
inputs.description: Dedicated pitch tracking CV for Filter A — tracks over several octaves at self-oscillation
inputs.normalizedTo: feeds Filter B's 1V/OCT when B is unpatched

inputs.name: 1V/OCT (B)
inputs.description: Dedicated pitch tracking CV for Filter B

inputs.name: FM1 (A)
inputs.description: First cutoff CV for Filter A (attenuator)

inputs.name: FM1 (B)
inputs.description: First cutoff CV for Filter B (attenuator)

inputs.name: FM2 (A)
inputs.description: Second cutoff CV for Filter A (attenuverter)
inputs.normalizedTo: feeds B's FM2 when B unpatched

inputs.name: FM2 (B)
inputs.description: Second cutoff CV for Filter B (attenuverter)

inputs.name: Q (A)
inputs.description: CV for Filter A resonance (external attenuator recommended)

inputs.name: XFADE CV
inputs.description: CV for crossfader — scaled by XFADE attenuverter

outputs.name: OUT A
outputs.description: Filter A direct output (post-overdrive if switched on)

outputs.name: MIX
outputs.description: Crossfaded A/B mix with DRY switches and PHASE INVERT applied

behaviors.name: Six filter modes
behaviors.description: LP2 (2-pole low), LP1 (1-pole low), BP1 (1-pole band), HP1 (1-pole high), HP2 (2-pole high), BR1 (notch/band-reject). Modes are instant-switchable — makes live timbre morphs easy.

behaviors.name: Dual sine oscillator
behaviors.trigger: Q at max, IN unpatched, 1V/OCT patched
behaviors.description: Each filter self-oscillates at max Q, producing a pitched sine that tracks 1V/oct. Two independent pitched sines — useable as a full duophonic VCO pair.

behaviors.name: Q-Drive squaring
behaviors.description: Q-Drive soft-clips the resonant sine, adding harmonics and gradually squaring the waveform. Fattens self-oscillation from pure sine toward reed/brass territory without breaking tracking.

behaviors.name: Series cutoff stacking
behaviors.description: A's output → B's input. Two same-mode filters in series steepen the slope (e.g., LP2 + LP2 = 4-pole). Mixed modes create formant-like peaks when cutoffs sit close.

behaviors.name: Overdrive tone-control chain
behaviors.trigger: OVERDRIVE ON · Series mode · Filter B as tone
behaviors.description: Filter A distorts aggressively; Filter B becomes a tone control sculpting the saturated signal. Modulating B's cutoff under performance control adds dynamic distortion tone.

behaviors.name: Ring modulation via phase null
behaviors.trigger: Parallel · DRY both · PHASE INVERT ON · XFADE noon · XFADE CV drives modulation
behaviors.description: With the two filter paths bypassed and Filter B phase-inverted, the XFADE knob nulls the signal. CV at XFADE CV jack multiplies in — yields ring modulation at MIX.

behaviors.name: Wet/dry distortion
behaviors.trigger: Parallel · DRY B ON · OVERDRIVE A ON
behaviors.description: XFADE knob becomes a wet/dry blend between distorted Filter A and untouched Filter B input. Parallel saturation without losing low-end clarity.

behaviors.name: 1V/OCT normal between filters
behaviors.description: A single pitch CV to Filter A's 1V/OCT tracks both filters (Filter B's jack normals from Filter A). Dummy-cable Filter B's 1V/OCT to break the normal for dual voices.

behaviors.name: FM2 normal between filters
behaviors.description: FM2 also normals A → B. One CV source can sweep both filter cutoffs simultaneously.

patchIdeas.name: Duophonic sine voices
patchIdeas.patch: Filter A Q max · 1V/OCT from sequencer A · OUT A · Filter B Q max · 1V/OCT from sequencer B (breaks normal) · OUT B · two pitched sines with independent tuning — CUTOFF knobs act as coarse tune
patchIdeas.diagram:
Morgasmatron:
* Filter A: Q max · CUTOFF ≈ C3
* Filter B: Q max · CUTOFF ≈ C4

Sequencer A:

Sequencer B:

- Sequencer A (Pitch) p> Morgasmatron (1V/OCT A)
- Sequencer B (Pitch) p> Morgasmatron (1V/OCT B)
- Morgasmatron (OUT A) -> Mixer (L)
- Morgasmatron (OUT B) -> Mixer (R)

patchIdeas.name: Self-osc kick
patchIdeas.patch: Filter A Q max · trigger → short AD → FM2 A (attenuverter positive) for pitch thump · second short AD → VCA after OUT A for amp · Q-Drive cranked for squarer attack · fat self-oscillated kick
patchIdeas.diagram:
Morgasmatron:
* Filter A: Q max · Q-Drive high · LP2

ENV A:

ENV B:

Sequencer:

- Sequencer (Trig) t> ENV A (Trig)
- Sequencer (Trig) t> ENV B (Trig)
- ENV A (Out) >> Morgasmatron (FM2 A)
- Morgasmatron (OUT A) -> VCA (In)
- ENV B (Out) >> VCA (CV)
- VCA (Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: 4-pole stacked LP
patchIdeas.patch: Both filters LP2 · Series ON · same CUTOFF, same Q · CV to FM2 A normals to B · single envelope opens both simultaneously — steep 4-pole slope with extra squelch from cascaded resonance
patchIdeas.diagram:
Morgasmatron:
* Series ON
* Filter A: LP2 · Filter B: LP2
* FM2 attenuverters: matched

VCO:

ENV:

- VCO (Out) -> Morgasmatron (IN A)
- ENV (Out) >> Morgasmatron (FM2 A) // normals to FM2 B
- Morgasmatron (OUT B) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Contrary motion notch/bandpass
patchIdeas.patch: Filter A BR1 · Filter B BP1 · Parallel · same LFO → FM2 A positive · FM2 B attenuverter inverted · as notch rises, bandpass descends · MIX sweeps between hollow and focused timbres
patchIdeas.diagram:
Morgasmatron:
* Parallel · Filter A: BR1 · Filter B: BP1
* FM2 A: +atten · FM2 B: -atten (inverted)

VCO:

LFO:

- VCO (Out) -> Morgasmatron (IN A)
- VCO (Out) -> Morgasmatron (IN B)
- LFO (Out) >> Morgasmatron (FM2 A) // normals to FM2 B inverted
- Morgasmatron (MIX) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Rat-overdrive synth lead
patchIdeas.patch: Saw VCO → IN A · Filter A LP2 · OVERDRIVE ON · Series · Filter B HP1 to tame bass · envelope → FM2 A with positive attenuation · modulate B's cutoff by hand for live tone sculpting over aggressive distortion
patchIdeas.diagram:
Morgasmatron:
* Series · OVERDRIVE A: ON
* Filter A: LP2 · Filter B: HP1

VCO:

ENV:

- VCO (Saw) -> Morgasmatron (IN A)
- ENV (Out) >> Morgasmatron (FM2 A)
- Morgasmatron (OUT B) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Ring-mod voice
patchIdeas.patch: Carrier osc → IN A · modulator osc → XFADE CV · Parallel · both DRY switches up · PHASE INVERT ON · XFADE knob noon to null · clangorous ring modulation at MIX
patchIdeas.diagram:
Morgasmatron:
* Parallel · DRY A: ON · DRY B: ON
* PHASE INVERT: ON · XFADE: noon

VCO 1:

VCO 2:

- VCO 1 (Saw) -> Morgasmatron (IN A)
- VCO 2 (Sine) >> Morgasmatron (XFADE CV)
- Morgasmatron (MIX) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Wet/dry parallel distortion
patchIdeas.patch: Bass VCO → IN A · IN B same source · Parallel · OVERDRIVE A ON · DRY B ON · XFADE = wet/dry blend · keeps bass weight while adding grit
patchIdeas.diagram:
Morgasmatron:
* Parallel · OVERDRIVE A: ON · DRY B: ON
* Filter A: LP2 · cutoff open

VCO:

Mult:

- VCO (Out) -> Mult (In)
- Mult (1) -> Morgasmatron (IN A)
- Mult (2) -> Morgasmatron (IN B)
- Morgasmatron (MIX) -> Output (In) // XFADE = distortion amount

patchIdeas.name: Formant vocalizer
patchIdeas.patch: Parallel · both BP1 · cutoffs set to two vowel formants (e.g., 800Hz + 1200Hz for 'ah') · slow LFO >> FM2 A only (no normal to B) for animated vowel morph · XFADE noon
patchIdeas.diagram:
Morgasmatron:
* Parallel · Filter A: BP1 · Filter B: BP1
* Cutoffs: formant pair

VCO:

LFO:

- VCO (Saw) -> Morgasmatron (IN A)
- VCO (Saw) -> Morgasmatron (IN B)
- LFO (Out) >> Morgasmatron (FM2 A) // vowel morph on A only
- Morgasmatron (MIX) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Send-FX with XFADE wet/dry
patchIdeas.patch: Drum mix → IN A · Parallel · heavy Q + OVERDRIVE on A · DRY B on · XFADE CV from slow LFO >> wet/dry breathing · dynamic FX send effect
patchIdeas.diagram:
Morgasmatron:
* Parallel · OVERDRIVE A: ON · DRY B: ON
* Filter A: BP1 · high Q

LFO:

- Drums (Out) -> Morgasmatron (IN A)
- Drums (Out) -> Morgasmatron (IN B)
- LFO (Out) >> Morgasmatron (XFADE CV)
- Morgasmatron (MIX) -> Output (In)
